description: Repair normalize_events so it returns events sorted by id with exact output fields in this order: id, title, kind, and public. Read ids from id, event_id, or metadata.id and skip blank or missing ids. Read title/kind from top-level fields or metadata aliases title/name and kind/type, trim title and kind, title-case title, and lowercase kind. Read public from top-level public or metadata public/visibility and default missing public to False. Public tokens 'public', 'yes', '1', and True mean True. Merge duplicate ids by preferring public records and later nonblank title/kind values.
